events.title: Civil War Cuisine Campfire
events.summary: Ever wondered what it was like to eat Civil War hardtack? Come down to Fort C.F. Smith and learn firsthand! We’ll sample campfire hardtack, coffee, and, of course, S’mores!

events.title: Nature Journaling
events.summary: Nature journaling does not require artistic ability, only curiosity about the natural world. Join Arlington Park Naturalist Nayeli Arellano to learn to identify common garden plants and various methods of recording observations. Please bring your own journal and preferred art supplies. This course will take place mostly outside in the Sensory Garden.
